hero.title: Trained and Sent as Spiritual Leaders
hero.subtitle: Discover the vision and heart behind Do Dream Together International.

overview.title: Program Overview
overview.name: Project Name: Do Dream Together International
overview.type: Type: Overseas Christian Youth Invitation Spiritual Training Program

purpose.title: Our Purpose
purpose.description: To invite overseas Christian youth for intensive education and systematic spiritual training on the essence of the Christian faith, nurturing the next generation of church leaders.

items.title: Spiritual Training
items.desc: Basic Christian faith, spiritual training, worship, community activities, and leadership training.

items.title: Korean Language
items.desc: Basic Korean conversation, reading, and writing education.

items.title: Cultural Experience
items.desc: Visiting Korean tourist attractions, experiencing Korean history and traditional culture.

effects.title: Expected Effects
items: Spiritual maturity and leadership capacity building for overseas Christian youth
Formation of an international faith network

organization.title: Organization
organization.director: General Director: Rev. Junhyung Kim (Young Adult Pastor, Podonamu Church)
